UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Stores user basic information and medical history summary.

SymptomCheck.title: Symptom Check Record
SymptomCheck.description: A record of a symptom check session with AI analysis.

uid.description: The user ID who performed the check.

title.description: A short, descriptive title for the conversation.

symptoms.description: The symptoms reported by the user.

isEmergency.description: Whether the AI flagged this as an emergency.

MedicalRecord.title: Medical Record
MedicalRecord.description: Uploaded blood tests, diagnosis, or other medical documents.

uid.description: The user ID who owns the record.

content.description: The text content or summary of the record.

originalDiagnosis.description: The original diagnosis from the doctor (if any).

medication.description: The medication prescribed by the doctor (if any).

Consultation.title: Doctor Consultation
Consultation.description: A request for a doctor to review a symptom check transcript.

uid.description: The user ID who requested the consultation.

doctorId.description: The ID of the doctor selected.

checkId.description: The ID of the symptom check record.

transcript.description: The full transcript of symptoms and AI analysis.

/users/{userId}/symptomChecks/{checkId}.description: History of symptom checks for a user.

/users/{userId}/medicalRecords/{recordId.description: Medical records uploaded by the user.
